# Reunait - AI-Powered Missing Person Platform

> Reunait is a community-driven, AI-powered platform designed to find missing persons and reunite families using state-of-the-art technology, verified volunteer networks, and integration with law enforcement.

## Key Features
- **[AI-Powered Matching](/cases):** Utilizes deep learning facial recognition and vector database search to match uploaded photos against registered missing person cases.
- **[Verified Operations](/contact):** Partners with local police departments (validating Case Reference Numbers/FIRs) and verified NGOs to moderate and verify case details.
- **[Location-Based Search](/cases):** Facilitates city, state, and country level geographic searches for missing person sightings.
- **[Real-Time Notifications](/volunteer):** Connects via Server-Sent Events (SSE) to send instant case updates and verification alerts to active volunteers.

## Crawler & LLM Guidelines
- **[Public Case Directory](/cases):** All active cases are indexable under `/cases` and `/cases/[id]`.
- **[Report a Case](/register-case):** Case registration forms are hosted under `/register-case`.
- **[Private Routes](/profile):** Pages requiring authentication (`/profile`, `/volunteer`, `/notifications`) are blocked in `robots.txt` and should not be crawled.
- **[API Guidelines](/api/homepage):** Public search endpoints do not require authorization, but registration and moderation write actions require secure Clerk tokens.
